claim: IP Reverse Engineered in QIK-VRT / DevOps / CI-CD operational sense.
precision_boundary: This is not a false claim to have fully re-derived every IETF TCP/IP detail specification. It is a QIK-VRT-conformant operative reconstruction of protocol logic in repository behavior.

qikvrt_repository_correspondence.addressing: file paths, artifact IDs, URLs, hashes, dependency IDs
qikvrt_repository_correspondence.packet_or_event_framing: JSONL events, manifests, acceptance records, protocol records
qikvrt_repository_correspondence.routing_or_forwarding: platform adapters, launcher dispatch, CI/CD workflow, GitHub-ready packaging
qikvrt_repository_correspondence.acknowledgement: transport/event arrival vs EFFECT_ACK release state
qikvrt_repository_correspondence.retry_timeout: dependency resolution, runtime download attempts, continue/rebuild path
qikvrt_repository_correspondence.provenance: hashes, source URLs, license areas, evidence files

qed: IP Reverse Engineered! q.e.d. Ingolf Lohmann
